title: AjShop
description: Aj Shop is a simple and powerful Minecraft shop plugin. Use the /shop command to buy or sell any item you want, with an easy-to-use interface. Players can purchase or sell items for in-game currency.
body:
AjShop is a powerful and easy-to-use shop plugin for Minecraft servers running Paper or Spigot.

### Features
- Open a shop GUI with the /shop command.
- Players can buy and sell items using in-game currency.
- Fully customizable shop items and prices through configuration files.
- Supports permissions, allowing you to control who can access or manage the shop.
- Integrates with EssentialsX and Vault for economy management.
- Simple and intuitive user interface for both players and admins.
- Introduced order system: players can create, accept, or cancel buy orders.

### How it Improves Your Server
- Allows server owners to create a player-friendly marketplace, encouraging a vibrant in-game economy.
- Reduces the need for manual item trading between players.
- Helps balance server economics by controlling what items are available and at what price.
- Easy for new players to understand and use, increasing engagement.

### Requirements
- EssentialsX and Vault must be installed for the plugin to handle the economy.

---

If you need help with setup or customization, support is available via Discord:_jacob_gamer_ or in-game: Killadi_Shibu ,Youtube: @aj_gaming373.
